items.title: New study finds many tuberculosis diagnoses may be incorrect
items.description: New research is now casting doubt on the true number of tuberculosis cases. That could carry significant implications for patient care and well-being.

items.title: March for Life attendees may have been exposed to measles, DC Health warns
items.description: D.C. health officials are contacting people possibly exposed to measles at the March for Life in January, as confirmed cases rise nationwide.
